svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(240, 245, 255), rgb(22, 27, 35)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(0, 82, 255), rgb(105, 175, 255));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 118px; height: 1px; padding-top: 30px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #0052ff;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#0052ff, #69afff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;
